attributes.title: [Ticura] Indicators expiring in next 24h
attributes.description: Indicators whose Ticura `ages_out` falls within the next 24 hours. Worth a quick look in case any are still operationally relevant.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"filter": [], "query": {"language": "kuery", "query": "_tier:\"data_hot\" and event.module:\"ti_ticura\" and not threat.indicator.expired:true and ticura.ages_out <= now+24h"}, "indexRefName": "kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}
